enGB: Combine Azata and Bard Performance Resources.
Removes Azata Performance Resource from Azata and replaces with additional bardsong. Reroutes Azata Performance Resource Cost to Bard. Should not break anything.

Replaces alternate Magus arcana selections caused by merged resources with regular Magus selections. Should improve multi-archetyping options. Will not require new blueprints. Currently only Eldritch Scion is covered, Thiefling (Homebrew Archetypes) will be covered in later versions.
